name: cpp-mastery
description: Learn C++ from absolute beginner to expert — interactive desktop app with built-in code editor, compiler, and structured curriculum.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer/js/app.js && node --check renderer/js/checker.js && node --check validate_curriculum.js && node --check lib/execution-manager.js
scripts.verify: npm run check:syntax && npm test && node verify_dom_bindings.js && npm run validate

author: CppMastery
